ksa_text: Skill in translating business questions and customer requirements into structured analytical approaches, including defining data requirements, scoping analysis, and selecting appropriate methodology.

Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4597 with signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.460, eu_ai_act=0.443, onet=0.438 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to BI Developer at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4597, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
